text.title: inverted-header-content-first Decision Tree
text.summary: One-call body-first vs two-call vs title-from-prompt.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the call produce BOTH a body and metadata about that body?

branch.conclusion: Methodology does not apply; ordinary schema design.

branch.question: Does the user supply the title as input?

branch.conclusion: Pass title in the prompt; omit from schema; body's description references it.

branch.question: Does the UI need the title to render BEFORE the body finishes streaming?

branch.conclusion: Split into two SO calls (body, then cheap metadata).
Use a single body-first schema; metadata fields after `body`.

text.example: q-call-produces → branch(true) → q-title-from-user → branch(false) → q-streaming-title → branch(false) → conclusion(r1-body-first).
